name: Vampire-Sunflower (PVZ)
description:
The Vampire Flower tries so hard! She's the adorable little goth of the garden, convinced that embracing the night is the key to winning. The thing is, she's not actually evil—she just really loves black eyeliner and dramatically announcing her entrance.

Unfortunately, her Vampire Beam isn't as powerful as she thinks. While it does drain life and heal her, it's a slow, gentle trickle. She frequently has to flutter out of fights because she can't quite siphon enough to stay in the action. She might be a bit squishy, but she makes up for her weakness with endless, self-professed charm. She doesn't drain life, she just... borrows it for a bit.

"Smash" - Frostylikestittes
creator: WhiteLikesTitties
